parsed.availability_comment: Available for IPL start on current evidence; only modest haircut for standard uncertainty until matchday squads are seen.
parsed.availability_note: West Indies T20 World Cup duty ended on 9 March 2026, before CSK's first listed fixture on 30 March 2026; no later injury or withdrawal report found.
parsed.followup_reason: Need first CSK XIs/team sheets to confirm whether Hosein starts ahead of Noor Ahmad or is used only for specific conditions.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Competes most directly with Noor Ahmad for left-arm spin usage, while Ellis, Matt Henry, Jamie Overton, Matthew Short and Zak Foulkes also affect the four-overseas mix.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Heavy overseas-slot pressure. Hosein is one of several foreign bowling/all-round options, so selection is likely surface and balance dependent.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: In CSK squad, but overseas spin slot looks shared/conditional with Noor Ahmad and broader overseas balance.
